# Private Tutoring / Lesson Teacher — Nigeria-First Research Brief

**Niche ID:** P2-tutoring-private-lessons
**Vertical slug:** tutoring
**Research date:** 2026-04-25
**Agent:** replit-agent-2026-04-25-session-C

## 1. Nigerian Market Context
Private tutoring is massive in Nigeria, driven by competitive university entrance (JAMB/UTME with ~1.9M annual candidates), WAEC/NECO secondary school exams, and GCE re-sitting. Market split: primary school lessons (ages 5-12), secondary school (WAEC/NECO prep), JAMB/post-UTME prep, university course tutoring, and adult learning (professional certifications). Pricing: ₦5,000–₦30,000 per week for private home tutoring; ₦15,000–₦50,000/month for tutorial centres. Group classes cheaper. Discovery path: word of mouth is dominant; WhatsApp referral groups; Google "JAMB lesson teacher [city]". Teachers are individual tutors or small tutorial centres. Trust signals: academic credentials (degree certificate, WAEC results), subject expertise, JAMB success stories, referrals.

## 2. Trust Signals
- Teacher's academic qualification (B.Sc., M.Sc., Ph.D.)
- Subjects covered (specific WAEC/JAMB subjects)
- Pass rate ("15 of our students scored above 300 in JAMB 2024")
- WAEC/NECO grade history (aggregated, not individual)
- Testimonials from students/parents (Nigerian names)
- "Home service available" flag (very popular)
- Years of teaching experience

## 3. Key CTAs
- Primary: "Book a Free Trial Lesson" (WhatsApp)
- Secondary: "View Our Subjects"

## 4. Nigerian Academic Context
- JAMB (Joint Admissions and Matriculation Board) — university entrance exam; highest demand
- WAEC/NECO — senior secondary certificate; most common reason for lessons
- GCE — for re-sitters and private candidates
- Post-UTME screening (university-specific aptitude tests)
- Common subjects: Mathematics, English, Further Mathematics, Physics, Chemistry, Biology, Economics, Government, Literature in English
- "Home lessons" vs "centre-based lessons" — clear distinction matters

## 5. Website Structure
- Home: hero + subjects + fee summary + trial lesson CTA (WhatsApp)
- About: teacher qualifications, experience, teaching philosophy
- Services: subjects, class types (private/group/home), fee per session
- Contact: WhatsApp booking + phone + location (if centre-based)

## 6. Platform Invariants
- T4: all fees in kobo integers per session
- P2: NGN fees, JAMB/WAEC context, WhatsApp CTA
- CSS namespace: .tu-
